title: schnella porphyrotricha var. smithiana
side_effects: Schnella porphyrotricha var. smithiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In severe cases, consuming large quantities of this plant can lead to kidney damage and even liver failure. Additionally, improper use of Schnella porphyrotricha var. smithiana can cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes and respiratory problems, in sensitive individuals. If ingested in excess, it can also cause neurological symptoms, such as headaches and dizziness.
